description: Automated out-of-office reply (T8 / OUT_OF_OFFICE). Must be matched deterministically by det-ooo-001 (which is checked before det-referral-001, so the 'contact my colleague' phrase does not get misread as a referral). No human review required, no reply, sequence is paused (not stopped) pending the prospect's return.

input.reply_subject: Automatic reply: Quick question about your sales pipeline
input.reply_text: I am currently out of the office and will return on Monday. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague.
input.reply_text_snippet: I am currently out of the office and will return on Monday.

expected.notes: event_type=auto_reply_received is in SUPPORTED_EVENT_TYPES (Section F) so is_unsupported_event_type=false; it also makes prefilter.is_automated_response=true. det-ooo-001 (priority 13) is checked before det-referral-001 (priority 16) in Section A's chain, so the 'please contact my colleague' phrase never reaches the referral rule. terminal_status=COMPLETED_NO_SEND with human_review_required=false is an intentional successful resolution under the project's five-minute objective (no reply needed), not a failure.
